metadata.title: Dawat Ul Muslimeen - Complete Collection of Authentic Duas & Adhkar
metadata.based_on: Quran and Sahih Hadith (Bukhari, Muslim, Abu Dawud, Tirmidhi, Ibn Majah)

morning.name: Morning Duas (أذكار الصباح)
morning.description: Recite after Fajr prayer until sunrise for protection and blessings

duas.title: Dua for Morning Protection
duas.arabic: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillahi wal-hamdu lillah
duas.translation: We have entered the morning and at this time all sovereignty belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah.

duas.title: Morning Protection (Recite 3 Times)
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'as-mihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-samee'ul 'aleem
duas.translation: In the name of Allah with whose name nothing can cause harm on earth or in the heavens. And He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
duas.benefit: Whoever recites it 3 times in the morning, no sudden calamity will befall him until evening

duas.title: Sayyidul Istighfar (The Best Dua for Forgiveness)
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta rabbi la ilaha illa anta khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mas-tata'tu, a'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya wa abu'u bidhanbi faghfir li fa innahu la yaghfirudh-dhunuba illa anta
duas.translation: O Allah, You are my Lord. There is none worthy of worship but You. You created me and I am Your slave. I abide by Your covenant and promise as best I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your favors upon me and I acknowledge my sins. So forgive me, for none forgives sins except You.
duas.benefit: Whoever says it in the morning with conviction and dies that day enters Paradise

duas.title: Dua for Morning and Evening Protection
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma bika asbahna wa bika amsayna wa bika nahya wa bika namootu wa ilaykan-nushoor
duas.translation: O Allah, by Your leave we have reached the morning and by Your leave we reach the evening. By Your leave we live and by Your leave we die, and to You is the resurrection.

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Evil Eye and Harm
duas.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bikalimatillahit-tammati min sharri ma khalaq
duas.translation: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.

evening.name: Evening Duas (أذكار المساء)
evening.description: Recite after Asr prayer until sunset for protection and blessings

duas.title: Dua for Evening Protection
duas.arabic: أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillahi wal-hamdu lillah
duas.translation: We have entered the evening and at this time all sovereignty belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah.

duas.title: Evening Protection (Recite 3 Times)
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Bismillahil-ladhi la yadurru ma'as-mihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-samee'ul 'aleem
duas.translation: In the name of Allah with whose name nothing can cause harm on earth or in the heavens. And He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.
duas.benefit: Whoever recites it 3 times in the evening, no sudden calamity will befall him until morning

duas.title: Dua for Evening Remembrance
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بِكَ أَمْسَيْنَا وَبِكَ أَصْبَحْنَا وَبِكَ نَحْيَا وَبِكَ نَمُوتُ وَإِلَيْكَ الْمَصِيرُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma bika amsayna wa bika asbahna wa bika nahya wa bika namootu wa ilaykal-maseer
duas.translation: O Allah, by Your leave we have reached the evening and by Your leave we reach the morning. By Your leave we live and by Your leave we die, and to You is the final return.

sleep.name: Duas Before Sleeping (أذكار النوم)
sleep.description: Recite before going to sleep for protection throughout the night

duas.title: Dua Before Sleeping
duas.arabic: بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا
duas.transliteration: Bismika Allahumma amootu wa ahya
duas.translation: In Your name O Allah, I die and I live.

duas.title: Ayatul Kursi (Complete) - The Throne Verse
duas.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۚ مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۚ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۚ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
duas.transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa huwal hayyul qayyoom, la ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa la nawm, lahu ma fis-samawati wa ma fil-ard, man dhal-ladhi yashfa'u 'indahu illa bi-idhnih, ya'lamu ma bayna aydeehim wa ma khalfahum, wa la yuhituna bishay'im min 'ilmihi illa bima sha'a, wasi'a kursiyyuhus-samawati wal-ard, wa la ya'ooduhu hifdhuhuma, wa huwal 'aliyyul 'adheem
duas.translation: Allah! There is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of existence. Neither drowsiness overtakes Him nor sleep. To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth. Who is it that can intercede with Him except by His permission? He knows what is before them and what will be after them, and they encompass not a thing of His knowledge except for what He wills. His Kursi extends over the heavens and the earth, and their preservation tires Him not. And He is the Most High, the Most Great.
duas.benefit: Whoever recites it before sleep, Allah appoints an angel to protect him until morning

duas.title: Dua When Turning Over in Bed
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، وَلَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ الْعَلِيِّ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu, wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer, subhanallah, wal-hamdu lillah, wa la ilaha illallah, wallahu akbar, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billahil 'aliyyil 'adheem
duas.translation: There is none worthy of worship but Allah alone, Who has no partner. His is the dominion and to Him belongs all praise, and He is able to do all things. Glory be to Allah, praise be to Allah, there is none worthy of worship but Allah, Allah is the Greatest. There is no power and no strength except with Allah, the Most High, the Most Great.

duas.title: Dua for Waking Up
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushoor
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us life after taking it from us, and to Him is the resurrection.

prayer.name: Duas After Prayer (أذكار الصلاة)
prayer.description: Recite after each obligatory prayer for forgiveness and blessings

duas.title: Tasbih After Salah (33, 33, 34)
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ (٣٣ مرة) · الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ (٣٣ مرة) · اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ (٣٤ مرة)
duas.transliteration: Subhanallah (33 times) · Alhamdulillah (33 times) · Allahu Akbar (34 times)
duas.translation: Glory be to Allah (33 times), Praise be to Allah (33 times), Allah is the Greatest (34 times)
duas.benefit: Your sins will be forgiven even if they are like the foam of the sea

duas.title: Dua After Salah for Help in Worship
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma a'inni 'ala dhikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibadatik
duas.translation: O Allah, help me to remember You, thank You, and worship You in the best manner.

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Hellfire
duas.arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-akhirati hasanatan wa qina 'adhaban-nar
duas.translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.

eating.name: Duas for Eating (أذكار الطعام)
eating.description: Recite before and after meals for blessings and gratitude

duas.title: Dua Before Eating
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.
duas.benefit: If you forget to say it at the beginning, say 'Bismillahi awwalahu wa akhirahu' when you remember

duas.title: Dua After Eating
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنَا وَسَقَانَا وَجَعَلَنَا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi at'amana wa saqana wa ja'alana minal-muslimeen
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who gave us food and drink and made us Muslims.

duas.title: Complete Dua After Eating
duas.arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
duas.transliteration: Alhamdulillahil-ladhi at'amani hadha wa razaqanihi min ghayri hawlin minni wa la quwwah
duas.translation: All praise is for Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any strength or power on my part.
duas.benefit: Whoever says this, his past sins are forgiven

duas.title: Dua for Drinking Milk
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَزِدْنَا مِنْهُ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma barik lana feehi wa zidna minhu
duas.translation: O Allah, bless us in it and give us more of it.

travel.name: Duas for Traveling (أذكار السفر)
travel.description: Recite when starting a journey, during travel, and upon return

duas.title: Dua When Boarding a Vehicle
duas.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-ladhi sakhkhara lana hadha wa ma kunna lahu muqrineen wa inna ila rabbina lamunqaliboon
duas.translation: Glory be to Him who has subjugated this for us, for we could never have done it by ourselves. And to our Lord we shall return.

duas.title: Dua for Safe Travel
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ فِي سَفَرِنَا هَٰذَا الْبِرَّ وَالتَّقْوَىٰ وَمِنَ الْعَمَلِ مَا تَرْضَىٰ، اللَّهُمَّ هَوِّنْ عَلَيْنَا سَفَرَنَا هَٰذَا وَاطْوِ عَنَّا بُعْدَهُ، اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الصَّاحِبُ فِي السَّفَرِ وَالْخَلِيفَةُ فِي الْأَهْلِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inna nas'aluka fi safarina hadhal-birra wat-taqwa wa minal-'amali ma tardha, Allahumma hawwin 'alayna safarana hadha watwi 'anna bu'dahu, Allahumma antas-sahibu fis-safari wal-khaleefatu fil-ahl
duas.translation: O Allah, we ask You on this journey for righteousness, piety, and deeds that please You. O Allah, make this journey easy for us and shorten its distance. O Allah, You are our companion on the journey and the One Who looks after our family.

duas.title: Dua Upon Returning from Travel
duas.arabic: آيِبُونَ تَائِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ
duas.transliteration: A'iboona ta'iboona 'abidoona lirabbina hamidoon
duas.translation: We are returning, repenting, worshipping, and praising our Lord.

stress.name: Duas for Anxiety, Stress & Distress (أذكار الكرب والهم)
stress.description: Recite during times of worry, difficulty, or hardship

duas.title: Dua for Anxiety and Sorrow
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي عَبْدُكَ، ابْنُ عَبْدِكَ، ابْنُ أَمَتِكَ، نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ، مَاضٍ فِيَّ حُكْمُكَ، عَدْلٌ فِيَّ قَضَاؤُكَ، أَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ، سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ، أَوْ أَنْزَلْتَهُ فِي كِتَابِكَ، أَوْ عَلَّمْتَهُ أَحَدًا مِنْ خَلْقِكَ، أَوِ اسْتَأْثَرْتَ بِهِ فِي عِلْمِ الْغَيْبِ عِنْدَكَ، أَنْ تَجْعَلَ الْقُرْآنَ رَبِيعَ قَلْبِي، وَنُورَ صَدْرِي، وَجَلَاءَ حُزْنِي، وَذَهَابَ هَمِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni 'abduka, ibn 'abdika, ibn amatika, naasiyati biyadika, maadin fiyya hukmuka, 'adlun fiyya qadha'uka, as'aluka bikullis-min huwa laka, sammayta bihi nafsaka, aw anzaltahu fi kitabika, aw 'allamtahu ahadan min khalqika, awista'tharta bihi fi 'ilmil-ghaybi 'indaka, an taj'alal-qur'ana rabee'a qalbi, wa noora sadri, wa jala'a huzni, wa dhahaba hammi
duas.translation: O Allah, I am Your slave, son of Your male slave, son of Your female slave. My forelock is in Your hand. Your command over me is forever executed and Your decree over me is just. I ask You by every Name belonging to You which You have named Yourself with, or revealed in Your Book, or taught to any of Your creation, or kept unto Yourself in the knowledge of the unseen, to make the Qur'an the spring of my heart, the light of my chest, the remover of my sadness, and the banisher of my anxiety.
duas.benefit: Allah will remove his sorrow and replace it with joy

duas.title: Hasbunallah (Allah is Sufficient for Us)
duas.arabic: حَسْبُنَا اللَّهُ وَنِعْمَ الْوَكِيلُ
duas.transliteration: Hasbunallahu wa ni'mal wakeel
duas.translation: Allah is sufficient for us and He is the best disposer of affairs.
duas.benefit: Said by Ibrahim (AS) when he was thrown into the fire

duas.title: Dua of Yunus (Jonah) AS - The Dua of Distress
duas.arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu minaz-zalimeen
duas.translation: There is no god but You. Glory be to You. Indeed I have been of the wrongdoers.
duas.benefit: No Muslim says this in any distress except Allah relieves it

duas.title: Dua for Protection from Helplessness and Laziness
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ وَالْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْهَرَمِ وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، اللَّهُمَّ آتِ نَفْسِي تَقْوَاهَا وَزَكِّهَا أَنْتَ خَيْرُ مَنْ زَكَّاهَا أَنْتَ وَلِيُّهَا وَمَوْلَاهَا، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عِلْمٍ لَا يَنْفَعُ وَمِنْ قَلْبٍ لَا يَخْشَعُ وَمِنْ نَفْسٍ لَا تَشْبَعُ وَمِنْ دَعْوَةٍ لَا يُسْتَجَابُ لَهَا
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika minal-'ajzi wal-kasali wal-jubni wal-bukhli wal-harami wa 'adhabil-qabr, Allahumma ati nafsi taqwaha wa zakkiha anta khayru man zakkaha anta waliyyuha wa mawlaha, Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min 'ilmin la yanfa'u wa min qalbin la yakhsha'u wa min nafsin la tashba'u wa min da'watin la yustajabu laha
duas.translation: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from helplessness, laziness, cowardice, miserliness, old age, and the torment of the grave. O Allah, grant my soul its piety and purify it, for You are the best to purify it. You are its Guardian and Master. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from knowledge that does not benefit, from a heart that does not fear, from a soul that is never satisfied, and from a supplication that is not answered.

funeral.name: Duas for Funeral & Deceased (جنازہ کے اذکار)
funeral.description: Recite when visiting the sick, at a funeral, and for the deceased

duas.title: Dua for the Sick
duas.arabic: لَا بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ
duas.transliteration: La ba'sa tahoorun insha'Allah
duas.translation: Do not worry. It will be a purification (for your sins), if Allah wills.

duas.title: Dua for the Deceased in Funeral Prayer
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اغْفِرْ لَهُ وَارْحَمْهُ وَعَافِهِ وَاعْفُ عَنْهُ، وَأَكْرِمْ نُزُلَهُ وَوَسِّعْ مُدْخَلَهُ، وَاغْسِلْهُ بِالْمَاءِ وَالثَّلْجِ وَالْبَرَدِ، وَنَقِّهِ مِنَ الْخَطَايَا كَمَا نَقَّيْتَ الثَّوْبَ الْأَبْيَضَ مِنَ الدَّنَسِ، وَأَبْدِلْهُ دَارًا خَيْرًا مِنْ دَارِهِ، وَأَهْلًا خَيْرًا مِنْ أَهْلِهِ، وَزَوْجًا خَيْرًا مِنْ زَوْجِهِ، وَأَدْخِلْهُ الْجَنَّةَ، وَأَعِذْهُ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ وَعَذَابِ النَّارِ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma ghfir lahu warhamhu wa 'aafihi wa'fu 'anhu, wa akrim nuzulahu wa wassi' mudkhalahu, waghsilhu bil-ma'i wath-thalji wal-baradi, wa naqqihi minal-khataya kama naqqaytath-thawbal-abyadha minad-danas, wa abdilhu daran khayran min darihi, wa ahlan khayran min ahlihi, wa zawjan khayran min zawjihi, wa adkhilhil-jannata, wa a'idhhu min 'adhabil-qabri wa 'adhabin-nar
duas.translation: O Allah, forgive him, have mercy on him, grant him well-being and pardon him. Honor his resting place and expand his entry. Wash him with water, snow, and hail. Cleanse him of sins as a white garment is cleansed of dirt. Give him a home better than his home, a family better than his family, and a spouse better than his spouse. Admit him into Paradise and protect him from the torment of the grave and the torment of the Fire.

entering_exiting_home.name: Duas for Entering & Exiting Home
entering_exiting_home.description: Recite when entering or leaving your home for blessings and protection

duas.title: Dua When Entering Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا
duas.transliteration: Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa 'alallahi rabbina tawakkalna
duas.translation: In the name of Allah we enter, and in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord Allah we rely.

duas.title: Dua When Leaving Home
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah, tawakkaltu 'alallah, la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah. There is no power and no strength except with Allah.
duas.benefit: The angels protect him and Satan stays away

mosque.name: Duas for Entering & Exiting Mosque
mosque.description: Recite when entering or leaving the mosque for blessings

duas.title: Dua When Entering Mosque
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahummaftah li abwaba rahmatik
duas.translation: O Allah, open for me the doors of Your mercy.

duas.title: Dua When Leaving Mosque
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlik
duas.translation: O Allah, I ask You of Your bounty.

wudu.name: Duas for Wudu (Ablution)
wudu.description: Recite before, during, and after Wudu for blessings

duas.title: Dua Before Wudu
duas.arabic: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ
duas.transliteration: Bismillah
duas.translation: In the name of Allah.

duas.title: Dua After Wudu
duas.arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
duas.transliteration: Ashhadu an la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, wa ashhadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasuluh
duas.translation: I bear witness that there is none worthy of worship but Allah alone, Who has no partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and Messenger.
duas.benefit: The eight gates of Paradise are opened for him

quran.name: Duas for Reciting Quran
quran.description: Recite before and after reading the Quran for blessings

duas.title: Dua Before Reciting Quran
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْهُ نُورًا لِّقَلْبِي، وَجَلَاءً لِّحُزْنِي، وَذَهَابًا لِّهَمِّي
duas.transliteration: Allahumma-j'alhu nooran liqalbi, wa jala'an lihuzni, wa dhahaban lihammi
duas.translation: O Allah, make it a light for my heart, a removal for my sorrow, and a banisher for my anxiety.

duas.title: Dua After Reciting Quran
duas.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْحَمْنِي بِالْقُرْآنِ، وَاجْعَلْهُ لِي إِمَامًا وَنُورًا وَهُدًى وَرَحْمَةً
duas.transliteration: Allahummarhamni bil-qur'an, waj'alhu li imaman wa nooran wa hudan wa rahmah
duas.translation: O Allah, have mercy on me through the Quran, and make it for me a leader, a light, a guidance, and a mercy.
